features.name: Parquet File Import/Export
features.description: Lets users open, read, and save Datagrok DataFrames as Apache Parquet files, with WASM-based columnar encoding/decoding. Registered as a platform file handler for .parquet files and as a file exporter menu entry.
features.evidence_summary: fromParquet/toParquet/parquetFileHandler/saveAsParquet all share the 'parquet' name root, ext='parquet' meta, and changelog history; parquetInit is the autostart WASM loader that backs them.

features.name: Feather File Import/Export
features.description: Lets users open, read, and save Datagrok DataFrames as Feather (Arrow IPC stream) files. Registered as a platform file handler for .feather files and as a file exporter menu entry.
features.evidence_summary: fromFeather/toFeather/featherFileHandler/saveAsFeather share the 'feather' name root and ext='feather' meta, covering the full read-write lifecycle for the Arrow IPC format.
